# `ToggleBit`

**Systems:** MOS6502, M6809  
**Parameters:** `a,b,b`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>
Toggles the bit given from parameter 2 at the address in parameter 1 on or off (parameter 3)</p>
<p>
<b>Examples</b>
</p> 
<p><code>
ToggleBit(SPRITE_BITMASK, 3, 0); // Turn off sprite 3 

// Loop through all bits 
for i:=0 to 8 do 
     ToggleBit(my_address, i, val[i]);
     </code>

</div>
